instruction: Building a car step by step (step 2 of 6). So far you've drawn: body. Add the next part: polygon (points 28,64 40,44 88,44 100,64, fill #3b82f6) with id "roof".
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <rect id="body" fill="#3b82f6" x="16" y="64" width="96" height="24" rx="4" ry="4" />
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <rect id="body" fill="#3b82f6" x="16" y="64" width="96" height="24" rx="4" ry="4" />
  <polygon id="roof" fill="#3b82f6" points="28,64 40,44 88,44 100,64" />
</svg>
